regional_cost_note: Asphalt contractors in Gisborne typically charge $85–$140/m² for an asphalt driveway and $28–$60/m² for chip seal. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Get a written quote that specifies base preparation — a well-prepared sub-base is the key to a long-lasting driveway.
